description:
You are a Market Research Analyst managing a longitudinal consumer panel. Populate LimeSurvey's Central Participant Database (CPDB) by creating custom participant attributes 'Market_Segment' and 'Recruitment_Source' (both text boxes). Add the following five panelists to the CPDB and assign them to the active survey titled 'Q1 2024 Brand Perception Tracker':

- Rachel Whitmore (r.whitmore@consumerpanel.net) | Market_Segment: Millennials 25-34 | Recruitment_Source: Social Media Ad
- James Nakamura (j.nakamura@consumerpanel.net) | Market_Segment: Gen X 45-54 | Recruitment_Source: Email Campaign
- Amira Boualem (a.boualem@consumerpanel.net) | Market_Segment: Gen Z 18-24 | Recruitment_Source: University Partnership
- Carlos Medina (c.medina@consumerpanel.net) | Market_Segment: Boomers 55-64 | Recruitment_Source: Print Advertisement
- Priya Subramanian (p.subramanian@consumerpanel.net) | Market_Segment: Millennials 25-34 | Recruitment_Source: Referral Program

Login credentials: admin / Admin123!
